name: Suspicious Commandline Escape Detected
description: Detection of processes using suspicious command-line arguments with escape characters. Adversaries often use escape characters to obfuscate their commands and evade security defenses. This is a common defense evasion technique.

prompts.prompt: An alert has been triggered on the host **{host}**: a process, **{image}**, was executed with a suspicious command line: **{command}**. The command contains unusual escape characters, which is a strong indicator of **Defense Evasion** (**MITRE ATT&CK T1140**), where an adversary is attempting to obfuscate a malicious command to bypass security controls. Immediate investigation is required to determine the legitimacy of this action and to remove the malicious process. The event occurred under the user **{user}**.

parameters.name: host
parameters.description: The name of the host where the event occurred.

parameters.name: image
parameters.description: The process image that was executed.

parameters.name: command
parameters.description: The full command line that was executed with the escape characters.

parameters.name: user
parameters.description: The user account that performed the action.
